name: Arrabbiata Sauce
recipeIngredient: Italian plum tomatoes (4 cans, each weighing 35 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat until hot but not smoking. Add the crushed garlic and cook, stirring occasionally for about 2 minutes. Do not brown.
2. Stir in the tomatoes with their juice, salt, and red pepper flakes. Bring to a boil over high heat. Reduce the heat to low and simmer, uncovered, for 50 minutes or until the sauce thickens slightly. Stir occasionally and crush the tomatoes with the back of a spoon.
3. For a smooth texture, press the tomato mixture through a food mill into a large bowl. (Alternatively, you can leave the sauce chunky.)
4. Allow the sauce to cool slightly before serving. Spoon into jars for storage in the refrigerator for up to one week, or freeze in freezer-proof containers for up to two months.
